notes: Stock valuation debited at goods receipt (WE shadow). Not a P&L account.
Customer AR debited by the RV billing shadow. Balance-sheet, not margin.
Vendor AP credited by the RE invoice shadow. Balance-sheet, not margin.
VAT collected on service billing (RV shadow). Pass-through, excluded from margin.
Goods-receipt/invoice-receipt clearing. Debited by RE, credited by WE. Nets to zero.
Categorisation slot for device cost of goods. In this MVP the margin model sources device cost from procurement (RSEG) amortised over the 24-month contract, not from a standalone COGS posting.
Monthly service subscription revenue credited by the RV billing shadow. The revenue side of CPE net margin.
